UnusedPrivateProperty:StelekitViewModel.kt$StelekitViewModel$// Debounce manager for block updates private val debounceManager = DebounceManager(scope, 300L)
UseCheckOrError:BacklinkRenamer.kt$BacklinkRenamer$throw IllegalStateException("Failed to move page file for '${page.name}' — disk and DB may be out of sync")
UseCheckOrError:DriverFactory.android.kt$DriverFactory$throw IllegalStateException("DriverFactory not initialized with a Context.")
UseCheckOrError:MigrationRunner.kt$MigrationRunner$throw IllegalStateException( "Cannot baseline: migrations ${alreadyPresent.map { it.id }} already in changelog" )
UseCheckOrError:OtelProvider.android.kt$OtelProvider$throw IllegalStateException("OtelProvider not initialized — call initialize() first")

UseCheckOrError:PlatformSettings.android.kt$SteleKitContext$throw IllegalStateException("SteleKitContext not initialized. Call init(context) first.")
UseCheckOrError:PlatformUtils.android.kt$PlatformUtils$throw IllegalStateException("DriverFactory must be initialized with a Context before calling PlatformUtils.getDatabaseDirectory().")
UseCheckOrError:SqlDelightBlockRepository.kt$SqlDelightBlockRepository$throw IllegalStateException("Failed to create new block during split")
